_meta.description: RedShadow V4 local CVE fallback map — used when NVD API is unavailable. Real CVEs only. Each entry matches a normalised product name from PRODUCT_MAPPINGS in analyse.py.

nginx.description: HTTP request smuggling vulnerability allows reading responses to other clients in certain error_page and proxy configurations.
DNS resolver off-by-one heap write vulnerability allows remote code execution via a specially crafted DNS response.
ngx_http_mp4_module memory corruption vulnerability via a specially crafted mp4 file allows code execution or denial of service.

apache.description: Path traversal and remote code execution in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 via URL path traversal, allowing arbitrary file read and code execution if mod_cgi enabled.
Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-41773. Path traversal and remote code execution via crafted request URI, affecting Apache 2.4.49 and 2.4.50.
mod_proxy may forward requests with incorrect X-Forwarded-For header, allowing authentication bypass in downstream servers.
HTTP request smuggling in mod_proxy when RewriteRule or ProxyPassMatch configurations exist, allowing cache poisoning or authentication bypass.

apache tomcat.description: Request smuggling allows bypass of security restrictions when Tomcat is behind a reverse proxy.
Denial of service via incomplete fix for CVE-2023-24998 — no limit on upload parts when default servlet used.
Ghostcat: AJP connector file read/inclusion vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote code execution via AJP port (8009).

microsoft iis.description: Buffer overflow in WebDAV service allows remote code execution via crafted IF header. Actively exploited in the wild.
Remote code execution vulnerability in HTTP Protocol Stack (http.sys) — wormable, no authentication required.
HTTP Protocol Stack remote code execution — wormable vulnerability in http.sys allowing unauthenticated RCE.

openssl.description: Infinite loop in BN_mod_sqrt() when parsing certificates with invalid explicit elliptic curve parameters — denial of service.
Buffer overflow in X.509 certificate verification, specifically in punycode decoding — can cause crashes or remote code execution.
Type confusion in X.400 address processing in X.509 GeneralName — allows read of memory contents or denial of service.
Heartbleed: heap buffer over-read via TLS heartbeat extension allows reading up to 64KB of server memory, exposing private keys and credentials.

openssh.description: Privilege escalation: helper programs run with sshd privileges in AuthorizedKeysCommand and AuthorizedPrincipalsCommand contexts.
Remote code execution via ssh-agent: a malicious SSH server can load arbitrary PKCS#11 libraries via forwarded agent connection.
regreSSHion: unauthenticated remote code execution via a race condition in signal handler in sshd — affects default configurations.

php.description: Remote code execution in PHP-FPM with certain nginx configurations. A specially crafted URL with a %0a byte can corrupt the FastCGI process manager.
PHP-FPM local privilege escalation via heap overflow in fpm_worker_pool, executable by www-data to escalate to root.
Denial of service via infinite loop in phar extension when parsing a specially crafted archive.

mysql.description: MySQL Server: Server component vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access to compromise and take over MySQL Server.
MySQL Server optimizer vulnerability allows authenticated user with network access to cause server crash or data manipulation.

mariadb.description: Denial of service via NULL pointer dereference in spider_db_mbase::print_warnings().
Denial of service via query with ORDER BY clause and temporary tables, causing assertion failure.

postgresql.description: Autovacuum and REINDEX allow any authenticated user to execute arbitrary SQL as a superuser via search_path manipulation.
CREATE SCHEMA permits superuser to bypass security restrictions, allowing privilege escalation via schema manipulation.

mongodb.description: Authenticated users can cause denial of service by running setParameter command with unrecognised parameters.
Denial of service via crafted query against free monitoring endpoint. Unauthenticated remote attacker can crash mongod.

redis.description: Sandbox escape in Lua scripting — a Lua library imported automatically exposes package.loadlib, allowing remote code execution.
Information disclosure via SRANDMEMBER, ZRANDMEMBER, ZRANDBYMEMBER commands may expose unintended data.
Denial of service via specially crafted MSETNX command causing memory exhaustion.

elasticsearch.description: Groovy sandbox escape allows remote code execution via crafted query — Groovy scripting engine bypasses security manager.
Memory disclosure in error messages — heap contents from Elasticsearch process may be exposed in error responses.
Denial of service via unauthenticated API request — uncontrolled resource consumption in search API.

memcached.description: Denial of service via crafted requests that trigger a use-after-free condition.

couchdb.description: Default Erlang cookie allows unauthenticated remote code execution via the epmd port (4369) if cluster port is accessible.

rabbitmq.description: HTTP API denial of service via large HTTP body — allows a privileged user to consume excessive memory.

apache kafka.description: Remote code execution via JNDI injection through crafted SASL configuration in Kafka Connect cluster.

apache activemq.description: Remote code execution via ClassInfo OpenWire protocol exploitation — unauthenticated attacker can load and execute remote ClassPathXmlApplicationContext. Actively exploited.

wordpress.description: Authenticated SQL injection via WP_Meta_Query due to insufficient sanitisation in the meta query system.
Directory traversal via translation files allows authenticated users with Subscriber role to read arbitrary files.
Information disclosure via unauthenticated access to private/draft posts using the REST API.

drupal.description: Drupalgeddon 2: remote code execution via unauthenticated request — allows execution of arbitrary PHP on the server.
Arbitrary PHP code execution via unsafe deserialization of session data when certain session backends are used.

joomla.description: Unauthenticated information disclosure via improper access check in API endpoints — exposes database credentials and configuration.

magento.description: Unauthenticated remote code execution via template injection in order confirmation email functionality — exploited in the wild.

jenkins.description: Arbitrary file read via CLI argument parser — unauthenticated attackers can read any file on the Jenkins controller.
XSS via crafted plugin name in Plugin Manager — allows remote code execution in victim's browser session.

gitlab.description: Account takeover via password reset without user interaction — reset email can be sent to an attacker-controlled address.
Remote code execution via ReDoS in Cargo package registry — allows execution of arbitrary commands on the server.

grafana.description: Path traversal via plugin endpoint allows unauthenticated read of arbitrary files on the Grafana server.
Stored XSS in Unified Alerting escalates to account takeover — attacker can create alert rules with malicious content.

kibana.description: Remote code execution via prototype pollution in Timelion visualisation — allows arbitrary OS command execution.
Information disclosure — sensitive field values revealed in error messages to unauthorised users.

prometheus.description: Denial of service via unbounded cardinality in HTTP instrumentation — ReDoS in path label pattern matching.

zabbix.description: Authentication bypass via unsafe client-side session storage when SAML SSO is enabled — allows admin account takeover.
Unauthenticated access to setup.php allows changing Zabbix frontend configuration.

kubernetes.description: Privilege escalation via API server — unauthenticated users can send requests directly to backend servers through the API server.
Node address re-use allows user traffic to be sent to wrong destination, bypassing network policies.
Privilege escalation via Windows nodes — users who can create pods on Windows nodes can escalate to admin privileges.

docker.description: Container escape via overwriting runc binary — attacker with write access to /proc/self/exe can execute code on the host.
Container escape via cgroup release_agent privilege escalation — allows host root access from unprivileged container.

etcd.description: Improper directory permissions allow local users with access to the data directory to read sensitive etcd state.
Learner nodes can be exploited to access limited sensitive information from the cluster.

spring framework.description: Spring4Shell: remote code execution via data binding on JDK 9+ with Tomcat — allows writing arbitrary files via class.classLoader.
Remote code execution via routing expression injection in Spring Cloud Function when routing functionality is used.

django.description: SQL injection via unsanitised queryset ordering on PostgreSQL — allows attackers to inject arbitrary SQL via crafted order parameter.
Denial of service via multipart form data parsing — specially crafted multipart requests exhaust memory.

ruby on rails.description: Remote code execution via unsafe YAML deserialization in ActiveRecord — specifically via YAML columns in databases.

express.js.description: Prototype pollution via express-fileupload middleware allows overwriting of Object.prototype properties.
Prototype pollution via qs library parsing — allows injection of __proto__ properties affecting all Object instances.

node.js.description: Denial of service via undici fetch API — specially crafted HTTP response causes infinite loop.
DNS rebinding vulnerability allows bypassing IP address allow-listing when the HTTP server listens on a wildcard address.

proftpd.description: Use-after-free in memory pool allocation allows remote code execution via crafted SITE CPFR or SITE CPTO commands.

vsftpd.description: Backdoor in vsftpd 2.3.4 — connecting with username containing ':)' triggers a bind shell on port 6200.

exim.description: Remote code execution via RCPT TO address — the return_path is passed to a shell command without sanitisation. Actively exploited.
Privilege escalation via improper neutralization of special elements — allows local privilege escalation to root.

postfix.description: SMTP smuggling allows sending emails with spoofed sender addresses by exploiting differences in SMTP message termination handling.

samba.description: SambaCry: remote code execution via a malicious shared library uploaded to a writable share — unauthenticated RCE.
Man-in-the-middle attack via use of LDAP without secure channel when joining a domain.

varnish.description: Denial of service via HTTP/2 rapid reset attack — allows unauthenticated remote attacker to exhaust worker threads.
HTTP/2 request smuggling via multiple content-length headers — allows cache poisoning and request forgery.

haproxy.description: Denial of service via crafted URI with a '#' character — HAProxy incorrectly handles this causing request processing failure.
Integer overflow in HTTP header parsing allows request smuggling — enables cache poisoning and authentication bypass.

traefik.description: Ingress route bypass — authenticated users can bypass route access restrictions via crafted routing rules.

envoy.description: Denial of service via HTTP/2 memory exhaustion — O(1) bytes from an attacker can cause Envoy to allocate arbitrarily large amounts of memory.

eclipse jetty.description: HTTP/2 integer overflow in hpack header parsing causes excessive memory allocation — denial of service.
Denial of service via excessive memory allocation when parsing multipart forms with large boundary strings.

sonarqube.description: Reflected XSS in code syntax highlighting — allows script injection via crafted URLs in the web interface.

jfrog artifactory.description: Stored XSS via artifact filename — allows injection of arbitrary JavaScript visible to all users browsing the repository.

sonatype nexus.description: Remote code execution via Java Expression Language injection in Groovy component — allows unauthenticated RCE.

squid.description: Request smuggling via chunked encoding — allows bypassing security controls and serving stale cached content.
Denial of service via buffer overflow in Digest authentication — unauthenticated remote crash.

microsoft exchange.description: ProxyLogon: server-side request forgery allows unauthenticated authentication bypass — used as part of Exchange full compromise chain.
ProxyNotShell: remote code execution via PowerShell — requires authenticated access to Exchange.

akamai.description: Command injection via locale parameter in web management interface — unauthenticated remote code execution. Note: this CVE affects TP-Link devices distributed via Akamai CDN, not the Akamai CDN itself.

cloudfront.description: XML parser vulnerability in expat library — context-dependent attackers can cause denial of service via crafted XML documents.
Timing side-channel in SCRAM authentication allows brute-force attacks against Kafka client credentials.

cloudinary.description: Code injection via unsanitised transformation parameters — authenticated attackers can execute arbitrary code via crafted media URLs.

lighttpd.description: Resource exhaustion via crafted HTTP request with chunked transfer encoding — allows denial of service.

influxdb.description: Authentication bypass via JWT token validation — any JWT with an empty secret or shared secret allows full access.

nagios.description: Path traversal leads to remote code execution via crafted GET request in Nagios XI autodiscovery module.

splunk.description: Remote code execution via XSLT transformation in dashboards — requires low-privileged authenticated access.

gitea.description: Remote code execution via git hooks — allows repository admin to execute arbitrary commands on the server.

dovecot.description: Privilege escalation via dict passdb — an authenticated user may gain privileges of another user.

bind dns.description: Stack exhaustion via recursive processing of large numbers of DNS control channel messages — denial of service.
Denial of service via sending many dynamic DNS update messages — exhausts resolver memory.

cassandra.description: Remote code execution via UDF (user-defined functions) when user-defined functions are enabled in cassandra.yaml.

strapi.description: Remote code execution via template injection in email templates — authenticated admin can execute arbitrary code on the server.

typo3.description: Information disclosure via improper access control in file module — backend users can access files outside their designated directory.
